mnemonics: C.O.A.T.S. (Catplot, Override styles, Aesthetics, Themes, Statistical plots) - a warm coat for visualizing data.
keyPoints: Seaborn is built on Matplotlib and provides a high-level interface for creating attractive statistical graphics.
It simplifies complex visualizations like multi-plot grids (FacetGrid), categorical plots (catplot), and distribution plots (distplot, kdeplot).
Seaborn automatically handles aesthetic elements like color palettes, themes (set_style), and plot context (set_context).
commonMistakes: Forgetting to import Seaborn (import seaborn as sns) and set the style before plotting.
Overriding Seaborn's aesthetic improvements by using low-level Matplotlib functions that reset the style.
Using the wrong plot type for the data (e.g., a bar plot for a distribution instead of a histogram or KDE).
